allow: Bash(cat /d/Projects/UNBOX/armarket/node_modules/next-intl/package.json 2>/dev/null | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('version','not installed'\)\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "next-intl: not installed")

Bash(python -c "import urllib.request, json; r = urllib.request.urlopen\('https://registry.npmjs.org/next-intl/latest'\); d = json.loads\(r.read\(\)\); print\('next-intl latest:', d['version']\); print\('peer next:', d.get\('peerDependencies',{}\).get\('next','?'\)\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "offline check needed")

Bash(python -c "
import urllib.request, json
packages = ['zustand', 'framer-motion', 'lucide-react']
for pkg in packages:
    try:
        r = urllib.request.urlopen\(f'https://registry.npmjs.org/{pkg}/latest'\)
        d = json.loads\(r.read\(\)\)
        peers = d.get\('peerDependencies', {}\)
        print\(f'{pkg}@{d[\\"version\\"]} | peers: {peers}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'{pkg}: error - {e}'\)
" 2>/dev/null)
